sizing_rule.note: Dynamic fractional f sizing: Position size = (Variance^0.5) × ACTV × (YEARDAYS^0.5). Allocates fractional f_i (0–1) per market system weighted by W_i across N systems. Scales with active equity (ACTV) portion. Implements portfolio floor via dynamic fractional f. Multi-system portfolio insurance approach.

source_rule_text: Use dynamic fractional f position sizing based on portfolio volatility, variance, and active equity allocation to perform portfolio insurance with a defined floor.
